row.lpStmtT:
POINTER
GBL 32
1900-01-01 get operator IDs 218 POINTER
SELECT od.oprid FROM %Table(psoprdefn) od WHERE od.lastupddttm > (%CurrentDateIn - 3) ORDER BY od.oprid
0 POINTER 0 HANDLE

POINTER
GBL 32
1900-01-01 get operator IDs (filtered) 260 POINTER
SELECT od.oprid FROM %Table(psoprdefn) od WHERE od.lastupddttm > (%CurrentDateIn - 3) and od.oprid like :1 ORDER BY od.oprid
0 POINTER 0 HANDLE

POINTER
GBL 32
1900-01-01 get operator roles 188 POINTER
SELECT ru.rolename FROM %Table(psroleuser) ru WHERE ru.roleuser = :1 ORDER BY ru.rolename
0 POINTER 0 HANDLE

POINTER
GBL 32
1900-01-01 get roles 138 POINTER
SELECT rd.rolename FROM %Table(psroledefn) rd ORDER BY rd.rolename
0 POINTER 0 HANDLE

POINTER
GBL 32
1900-01-01 get role permission lists 176 POINTER
select rc.classid from %table(psroleclass) rc where rc.rolename = :1 order by rc.classid
0 POINTER 0 HANDLE
